research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
trigger_or_signal: Repeated visits, slow lab drift, weight loss, multi-system symptoms
product_concept: Auto-cluster symptoms/labs/visits/referrals into unresolved diagnostic threads.
risk_or_guardrail: Avoid over-alerting by requiring meaningful change, persistence, or multi-domain convergence.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
trigger_or_signal: Return within days/weeks for same/worse complaint
product_concept: Require clinician to review prior diagnosis, what changed, and dangerous alternatives.
risk_or_guardrail: Must not punish necessary return visits; frame as safety support.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
product_concept: Assign owner + deadline + patient notification + acknowledgment + action status.
risk_or_guardrail: Escalation should be calibrated by criticality and context.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
trigger_or_signal: Clinician cites prior/normal test to close diagnosis
product_concept: Show test age, scope, symptom status, and what it cannot rule out.
risk_or_guardrail: Decision support should inform, not override, clinical judgment.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
trigger_or_signal: Patient says not being heard, severe impairment, or fear of missed disease
product_concept: Structured fields for patient concern, functional limits, photos, family history, and timeline.
risk_or_guardrail: Protect against stigmatizing notes; keep patient language respectful and relevant.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
trigger_or_signal: Anxiety/stress/weight/age/gender labels used with persistent physical symptoms
product_concept: Prompt clinician to document physical red flags ruled out before psychiatric attribution.
risk_or_guardrail: Do not imply mental health conditions are not real; focus on coexisting physical risk.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
product_concept: Suggest adjacent specialties and shared handoff summary for unresolved patterns.
risk_or_guardrail: Needs local referral availability and patient preference.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
trigger_or_signal: Unexpected significant finding or critical imaging detail
product_concept: Track from report to clinician acknowledgment, patient notification, referral, and closure.
risk_or_guardrail: Separate emergent critical findings from non-urgent but serious findings.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
trigger_or_signal: Chest pain, torsion symptoms, sepsis signs, focal deficits
product_concept: Condition-specific timers/checklists for serial ECG/troponin, ultrasound, CXR, CTA/perfusion.
risk_or_guardrail: Must permit clinician override with documented rationale.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
product_concept: Capture test unavailability, alternate plan, referral, and supply-chain alert.
risk_or_guardrail: Avoid penalizing clinics for stockouts; route data to system managers.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
trigger_or_signal: Stopped medication due to cost, adherence barriers, device/supply issues
product_concept: Surface medication interruption as a risk factor for emergency differentials.
risk_or_guardrail: Requires sensitive financial questions and privacy protections.

research_topic: Research B - missed signals, diagnostic errors, and late discovery cases
trigger_or_signal: Test ordered but not resulted before discharge
product_concept: Patient-facing and clinician-facing list of pending results, expected date, owner, and action plan.
risk_or_guardrail: Must ensure patients are not alarmed without interpretation pathways.
